title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 13 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 13 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 13 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/05/2022
May 13th, 2022 CFR Qingdao, USD/dry tonne DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, an increase of 0.98% throughout the day. the quotation in the morning was increased by 10 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.
